Ui.emomModeForTimeDescription: Sprint each window. Score = accumulated work time (lower is better).
Ui.emomModeForQualityDescription: Prioritize perfect form. Score = Pass / Fail.
Ui.emomModeAmrapDescription: Max reps each window. Score = total cumulative reps.
Ui.emomModeToFailureDescription: Fixed reps each window, keep going until you fail. Score = windows survived.
Ui.instructionFailureWithRest: Sets to failure · {rest} rest between sets
Ui.instructionEdt: EDT {duration} · accumulate max reps, reduce as needed
Ui.instructionDeathByWithMax: EMOM · +N/round per exercise until failure · max {rounds} rounds
Ui.instructionHrrWithCycles: Work → rest to {floor}bpm · resume at {ceiling}bpm · {cycles} cycles
Ui.instructionPyramidWithCap: Pyramid — up to peak then back down · cap {cap}

Ui.formatTooltip_untimed_how: No time constraint. Quality over speed.
Ui.formatTooltip_for_time_how: Complete all reps or rounds as fast as possible.
Ui.formatTooltip_train_to_exhaustion_how: Push each set to technical failure.
Ui.formatTooltip_kcal_target_how: Reach the calorie target as fast as possible.
Ui.formatTooltip_emom_trains: Power output, pacing, endurance, or technique
Ui.formatTooltip_emom_how: Same movement every interval. Choose a mode: For Time (sprint + rest), For Quality (form focus), AMRAP (max reps), or To Failure (survive as many windows as possible).
Ui.formatTooltip_emom_score: Accumulated work time / Pass-Fail / Total reps / Windows survived
Ui.formatTooltip_complex_emom_how: 2+ movements rotating each interval window. Choose: For Time, For Quality, AMRAP (grand total or lowest window), or To Failure.
Ui.formatTooltip_complex_emom_score: Accumulated work time / Pass-Fail / Total reps or lowest window / Stations cleared
Ui.formatTooltip_even_odd_how: Even minutes and odd minutes run different tasks.
Ui.formatTooltip_billat_how: Repeated max-effort intervals with equal rest.
Ui.formatTooltip_amrap_how: Accumulate as many rounds and reps as possible.
Ui.formatTooltip_edt_how: Accumulate as many reps as possible in the time window.
Ui.formatTooltip_death_by_how: Add reps every round until the round cannot be completed.
Ui.formatTooltip_tabata_how: Short work and rest intervals for fixed rounds.
Ui.formatTooltip_custom_hiit_how: Custom work and rest ratio for fixed rounds.
Ui.formatTooltip_cluster_how: Short intra-set rest between each rep cluster.
Ui.formatTooltip_hrr_how: Rest until heart rate drops to the target zone.
Ui.formatTooltip_ladder_ascending_how: Start at base reps and add step reps every round.
Ui.formatTooltip_ladder_descending_how: Start high and subtract reps every round.
Ui.formatTooltip_pyramid_how: Reps climb to a peak and then descend.
Ui.formatTooltip_rest_how: Passive rest for the given duration.
